settings.title: Jackie
settings.text: Latisha has been with me a little over a month now. She is beautiful, smart, sweet , and healthy. Marina does an excellent job communicating with you every step of the way. She contacts you with updates and addresses any concerns. She gives you all the documents and information regarding your kitten shots and microchipped upon receiving your kitten. She genuinely cares about the kittens well beings and even checks up on you after too see how they are doing. I would definitely recommend her to any of my family and friends.

settings.title: Maariyah
settings.text: I'm so thankful for My Felidae. I have my dream kitten because of them & will forever be grateful for that. She's my perfect little fur baby and I love her so much. We're a perfect match, she loves cuddles and is the most playful cat. My Felidae made the process so simple and you can tell how much love and care there is for every kitten they have. I'll forever be grateful that I found my sweet Malala through them!

settings.title: Alex
settings.text: I decided to get my first fur baby from My Felidae since they offered such gorgeous kittens. They were thoroughly responsive and communicated quickly, answering any concerns and questions I had about my kitten. They made things very simple and accessible which made for a very smooth process. I’d highly recommend and will be getting my fur baby a best friend from My Felidae soon :)

settings.title: Laura
settings.text: We absolutely loved our experience with Marina! She made everything quick and easy. She was incredibly communicative when I reached out to her and she answered all of the questions I had. Our kitty came with a kitty passport and a report of all her previous shots. Princess has a lovely temperament, SO gentle. She got along soo quick with our other cat, and now they’re best buds.

settings.title: Maria
settings.text: My Felidae made it so simple. After searching and searching, we saw "Ullis" and asked so much info on him and the breeder. A little less than a month, pick up is so easy!! (Even offer drop off!)  We are so happy with him. He is our big chunksters.

settings.title: Katia
settings.text: I would like to say thank you to MyFelidae. Thanks to them I have an alien cat and I will always be grateful to them for that. She is the most wonderful cat, and I love her very much. She is the perfect cat. They helped me decide on a kitten and even recommended her.  The kitten has all the paperwork and vaccinations. I am immensely grateful for such a family member. Thank you, MyFelidae.🤍☺️.

settings.title: Mina
settings.text: Thank you for making the world a better place, one furry friend at a time. Thankful for My Felidae. He is my perfect baby. He is very playful kitten. Thank you for all the trouble Marina took to find my favorite cat, you are the best, thank you

settings.title: Diana
settings.text:
[Translation] Scrolling through Instagram, I accidentally came across an advertisement for cats in Los Angeles, I decided to go in and see the pets. One kitten sunk into my heart, I decided to write and find out. Marina told
everything in detail which kittens, who are the parents, which ones are here and when you can see them. Marina fully instructed from a to z. Probably Marina pushed me to take this step to buy a kitten. Since that day, we have found our cat son. A month later, and the girl Xenia. Thank you Marina for such wonderful angels.

settings.title: Taylor
settings.text: I am so thankful for Marina!!!Without her, I would have never found my gorgeous Scottish Fold, Bella! When I first found her account on instagram, I figured I would reach out and feel out the situation, not knowing how legit everything was. Maria immediately gave me her personal contact information and set up calls and face times so that I could see the kittens and get to know her! She is literally so kind and helpful. I must say… I was rather picky when it came to the cat I wanted and she did everything and some to help me find my love! Thank you Maria for your help!

settings.title: Anym
settings.text: I was looking for a reliable place to get a kitty for the longest time and the best quality kitty. I came across Marina’s page, the most beautiful kitties I could think of . It was my first time getting a kitty online and while I don’t know anything about the other person, but Marina made it a very comfortable experience and helped me through whole process. I can wholeheartedly say that My.felidae has given me and my family the perfect kitties that are now my family members and might I add I proceeded to get 3 more kittens after my first one from her! They’re all our little family members! My main thing was finding an ethical person who is compassionate about animals, and transparent with the whole process, marina was just that. She guided me throughout the entire process, answered my questions promptly & gave me the most perfect kitten and bonus updates me on my kitties with videos and pictures before their arrival! Moreover, after the purchase, she’s been kind enough to answer any questions I have had!

settings.title: Erin
settings.text: My mom and I purchased two beautiful British longhair sisters from MyFelidae less than a month ago! We couldn’t be more in love with our little kitties. They are the most beautiful kittens are fully obsessed with them to say the least. Marina is such a lovely broker to work with. She helped us track down exactly what we were looking for very quickly. She is responsive in a timely manner and so helpful with any questions or concerns we’ve had along the way ( being we are new to this breed).  Could not recommend MyFelidae more! Thank you for helping add so to our family. We love Daisy and Violet so much!

settings.title: Andrea
settings.text: Found My Felidae via Instagram and fell in love with all the cats pictured but one cat in particular caught my family’s eye. After chatting with the seller Maria regarding the cat my husband and I decided to put our deposit on the kitten. We waited about a week and a half till the kitten  landed in Los Angeles. Finally the big day arrived to meet our new Furry family member! My family and I traveled 4+ hours away from up north to down south to pick up and meet our Kitten for the first time.  I have to say, We were so pleased with our new kitten.  We couldn’t have picked a better kitten or seller. Maria from My Felidae was amazing at communicating regarding the cat, when it was set to fly and arrive. Our kitten pictured was exactly what we received. We picked the best cat and we’re so blessed to have her part of our family. Our kitten is friendly, loving, super playful, healthy, has amazing temperament and the best companion to our toddler. I highly recommend My Felidae to everyone when purchasing a cat. Very secure and trusted cat broker. Thank you My Felidae we love our Kitten!

settings.title: Carolina
settings.text:
I just want to say thank you so much for such a beautiful kitty. He is so loving and affectionate. He loves to be held and is such an easy going kitten. Marina does a great job making sure your kitten is well and happy. She is also a great support for any questions and concerns. I
recommend anybody who is
considering a kitten to get one
from Marina. She brought me my biggest blessing and for that I
am eternally grateful.

settings.title: Blanca
settings.text:
I just want to say thank you so much for such a beautiful kitty. He is so loving and affectionate. He loves to be held and is such an easy going kitten. Marina does a great job making sure your kitten is well and happy. She is also a great support for any questions and concerns. I
recommend anybody who is
considering a kitten to get one
from Marina. She brought me my biggest blessing and for that I

settings.text: How was your experience with My Felidae? Contact Us to let us know!
